name: Talent Knowledge Map
description: Talent Knowledge Map (2025) Developed as a collaboration between UAB and UT Austin with Prof. Ying Ding’s lab for NIH-funded bridge2AI and CFDE communities. http://cm4aikg.vercel.app/

name: SpatialRSP
description: SpatialRSP: Identifying Embedding Space Patterns and Biomarkers in Single-Cell Gene Expression Data (2024) Developed at UAB with Peter (Zeyu) Yao.

name: Mondrian Map
description: Mondrian Map: Piet Mondrian’s Abstraction for Differential Pathway Analysis (2024) Developed at UAB. http://github.com/fuad021/mondrian-map with Fuad Al Abir.

name: WINNER
description: WINNER: Weighted In-Network Node Expansion and Ranking (2022) Developed at UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/WINNER/ with Zongliang Yue and others.

name: SEAS
description: SEAS: Statistical Enrichment Analysis of Samples (2021) Developed at UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/SEAS/ with Thanh Nguyen, Sameul Bharti, and others.

name: PGC
description: PGC: Polar Gini Curves for Finding Biomarkers from Single-cell RNA-seq Embedding Data (2021) Developed at UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/PGC/ with Thanh Nguyen and others.

name: PAGER-CoV
description: PAGER-CoV: A Database of Pathways, Annotated Gene Lists, and Gene Signatures for Coronavirus Disease Biology Studies. (2020) Developed at UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/PAGER-COV/ with Zongliang Yue, Eric Zhang, and others.

name: BEERE
description: BEERE: A Tool for Biomedical Entity Expansion, Ranking, and Explorations. (2019) Developed at UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/BEERE/ with Zongliang Yue.

name: WIPER Database
description: WIPER Database: Human Annotated and Predicted Protein Interactions. (2018) Developed at Indiana University & UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/wiper/ with Zongliang Yue and Thanh Nguyen.

name: HAPPI Database
description: HAPPI Database: Human Annotated and Predicted Protein Interactions. (2006, 2017) Developed at Indiana University & UAB. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/HAPPI/ with SudhaRani Mamidipalli, Ragini Pandey, and Thanh Nguyen.

name: PAGER
description: PAGER: Pathways, Annotated-lists, and Gene-signatures Electronic Repository (2014, 2017) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/PAGER/ with Chayaporn Suphavilai, Zongliang Yue, Michael Neylon, and Liugen Zhu.

name: PAGED
description: PAGED: Pathway And Gene-set Enrichment Database (2012) Developed at Indiana University. http://bio.informatics.uab.edu/PAGED/ with Hui Huang and Xiaogang Wu.

name: HOMER
description: HOMER: Human Organ-specific Molecular Electronic Repository (2011) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/HOMER/ with Fan Zhang.

name: PEPPI
description: PEPPI: a Peptidomic Database of Human Protein Isoforms for Proteomics Experiments (2010) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/PEPPI/ with Ao Zhou and Fan Zhang.

name: HPD
description: HPD: an Online Integrated Human Pathway Database (2009) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/HPD/ with Sudhir Chowbina, Xiaogang Wu, Peter Li, Ragini Pandey, Fan Zhang, and Harini N. Kasamsetty.

name: C2-Maps
description: C2-Maps: Connectivity Map Web Server. (2008) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/cmaps/ with Hui Huang, Ragini Pandey, and Jiao Li.

name: GeneTerrain
description: GeneTerrain: A Visualization Software Tool for Panel Expression Biomarker Discoveries (2008) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/geneterrain/ with You Qian and Shiaofen Fang.

name: HIP2
description: HIP2: A Database for Health Human Individual’s Integrated Plasma Proteome. (2007) Developed at Indiana University. http://discovery.informatics.uab.edu/HIP2/ with Sudipto Saha.

name: ProteoLens
description: ProteoLens: a Visual Data Mining and Querying Tool. (2006) Developed at Indiana University and Salt Lake City. http://bio.informatics.uab.edu/proteolens/ with Tianxiao Huan, Andrey Sivachenko, and Scott Harrison.
